steps.title: Identify the result
steps.content: Elodea canadensis absorbs cadmium and stores it safely in its roots and shoots. The following clause says cadmium concentrations in the soil decrease, which is the result of that absorption.

steps.title: Choose a consequence signal
steps.content: Choice A introduces a specific example, Choice B signals contrast, and Choice C adds another point. The sentence needs a transition meaning “as a result” to link absorption to lower soil cadmium. The answer is D.
